---
title: "FigS10_rRNA motifscan visualization"
author: "Jie Hua"
date: 2026-03-29
lang: en
date-modified: 2026-03-29
keywords: ["rDNA Quantification","Hybrid Cells","MotifScan"]
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    section-divs: true
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-copy: hover
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: tango
editor: visual
---

# Load the required packages

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(Biostrings)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
```

# Define the motifs.csv file

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

motifs_file <- "motifs.csv"
```

# Read the motifs.csv

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

motifs <- read.csv(motifs_file, header=T, sep=",",fill=TRUE)

```

# Define a function

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


make_alignment_df <- function(sub_df, line_width = 200) {
  
  seq1 <- DNAString(sub_df$sequence[1])
  seq2 <- DNAString(sub_df$sequence[2])
  
  aln <- pwalign::pairwiseAlignment(seq1, seq2, type = "global")
  
  s1 <- strsplit(as.character(pwalign::pattern(aln)), "")[[1]]
  s2 <- strsplit(as.character(subject(aln)), "")[[1]]
  
  n <- length(s1)
  
  df <- data.frame(
    pos = 1:n,
    base1 = s1,
    base2 = s2,
    match = s1 == s2,
    group = unique(sub_df$group),
    seq1_name = sub_df$motif[1],
    seq2_name = sub_df$motif[2]
  )
  
  # 🔥 自动换行（关键）
  df$block <- ceiling(df$pos / line_width)
  df$x <- ((df$pos - 1) %% line_width) + 1
  
  # 长格式
  df_long <- rbind(
    data.frame(
      group = df$group,
      block = df$block,
      x = df$x,
      y = df$seq1_name,
      base = df$base1,
      match = df$match
    ),
    data.frame(
      group = df$group,
      block = df$block,
      x = df$x,
      y = df$seq2_name,
      base = df$base2,
      match = df$match
    )
  )
  
  df_long
}
```

# Plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


df <- motifs %>%
  filter(!is.na(sequence)) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  filter(n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup()

df_align <- df %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  map_dfr(make_alignment_df)

my_family <- "sans"

p <- ggplot(df_align, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  
  # Background tiles
  geom_tile(
    aes(fill = match),
    colour = NA
  ) +
  
  # Bases
  geom_text(
    aes(label = base),
    family = my_family,
    size = 1.5,
    colour = "black"
  ) +
  
  facet_grid(
    group ~ block,
    scales = "free",
    space = "free",
    switch = "y"
  )+
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "TRUE"  = "grey80",
      "FALSE" = "#2b8cbe"
    )
  ) +
  
  # x 是数字，所以 continuous
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02)
  ) +
  
  # y 是字符/因子，比如 18S_dmel，所以 discrete
  scale_y_discrete(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    position = "right"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  
  theme_bw(base_family = my_family) +
  theme(
    # Transparent backgrounds
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    
    # Grid
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    
    # Border
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.1
    ),
    
    # Avoid double-thick borders
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    
    # Facet labels
    strip.text.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 6,
      family = my_family,
      color = "black",
      face = "plain",
      margin = margin(t = 0, r = 3, b = 0, l = 1)
    ),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 6,
      family = my_family,
      color = "black",
      face = "plain",
      margin = margin(t = 0, r = 3, b = 0, l = 1)
    ),
    
    # Axis text / ticks hidden
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.left = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y.right = element_text(
      size = 5.5,
      family = my_family,
      color = "black",
      margin = margin(l = 2, r = 0)
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    
    # Facet spacing
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.switch.pad.grid = unit(0, "pt"),
    strip.clip = "off",
    
    # No legend
    legend.position = "none",
    
    # Plot margin
    plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2)
  )

```

Save the plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


p_canvas <- p + ggview::canvas(180, 60, units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
p_canvas

#ggsave( "FigS10.pdf",p,device = cairo_pdf,dpi=600,units="mm",width=180, height=60)


```
